author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: 754a committed on feature/754a-v3-operation-mode: three passes (ref-tree infra + heartbeats/requests, mode routing with v3 event-only writes and state hydration, direct-reader sweep). Two correctness bugs found by agents during their own testing (checkpoint churn, claim-confirm partial-view masking) and one latent v3 bug caught in pass 3 (find_stale_locks V1-only heartbeats = all locks stale on v3). Director-verified gates: 1998 lib + 3007 bin + 194 integration, fmt, both clippy profiles. Awaiting push; after merge: run migrate hub-v3 on this repo for real, then 754b deletion PR.
